title:
Data storage
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
- Exploring Te Ao Māori perspectives on offshore data storage This report seeks to strengthen the Māori-Crown relationship by building understanding of Māori perspectives on data storage. It also aims to inform discussions and guide government agencies in their decision-making about storing data.

### Exploring Te Ao Māori perspectives on offshore data storage
This report seeks to strengthen the Māori-Crown relationship by building understanding of Māori perspectives on data storage. It also aims to inform discussions and guide government agencies in their decision-making about storing data.
